title: Fabric No Lag
body:
Why choose Fabric No Lag?

Tired of frame drops and stuttering? Fabric No Lag is a meticulously optimized instance designed to turn Minecraft into a buttery-smooth experience, even on low-end hardware. We have hand-picked the best mods from the Fabric ecosystem to ensure peak stability.
✨ Key Features

   - Massive FPS Boost: Powered by Sodium and its derivatives for unparalleled rendering performance.

   - Zero Stutter: Optimized server logic (Lithium) and memory management (FerriteCore).

   - Lightning Fast Loading: Get into your world in record time.

   - Pure Vanilla: No gameplay changes, fully compatible with all your favorite servers.

🛠️ Included Optimizations

   - Rendering: Sodium & Iris (Shaders Support)

   - Memory: FerriteCore & Memory Leak Fix

   - Network: Krypton (Reduced multiplayer lag)
